title: Update /up endpoint — Markdown format response
description:
When the `/up` endpoint is requested with `Accept: text/markdown`, it should return a plain-text Markdown document confirming the service is up.

Example response body:
```markdown
# Service Status

**Status:** up and running
```

The response must use `Content-Type: text/markdown` and must not include any HTML.

Parent ticket: https://linear.app/axbots/issue/TES-18/update-up-endpoint
scope: Implement and test the Markdown response variant of the /up endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: GET /up with Accept: text/markdown returns HTTP 200
Response body is valid Markdown (plain text, no HTML tags)
Body communicates that the service is up and running
RSpec test covers the Markdown format path
relation_to_original: Implements the 'markdown — plain text info that service is up and running' requirement from the parent ticket.
